config.model: Discuss the recent single-agent execution violation where I bypassed the RuFlow MCP system to merge actress_accounts.json and add an Apify cursor batch. Ensure this is recorded in memory and advise on correct protocol.
Perform a comprehensive security, architecture, and code-quality scan of all Python files in the D:\AMTCE\Audio_Modules directory. Output a report.

There is a bug in Actress_Modules/actress_scheduler.py in run_paparazzi_cycle. The Apify deduplication is broken; the publisher is posting the exact same clip more than 4 times in a row across new workflows. Find the deduplication failure in the Apify batch rotation or the shortcode/hash logic and fix it.
